creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nivit
Date: Mon Jul 23 12:52:24 2012
New Revision: 301391
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301391

Log:
  HTSQL ("Hyper Text Structured Query Language") is a high-level query
  language for relational databases. The target audience for HTSQL is the
  accidental programmer -- one who is not a SQL expert, yet needs a usable,
  comprehensive query tool for data access and reporting.
  
  This port provides the MySQL backend to HTSQL
  
  WWW:	http://htsql.org/
  
  RedPorts Log:	https://redports.org/buildarchive/20120714112050-51475/
  
  PR:		ports/169853
  Submitted by:	koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/
  head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Mon Jul 23 12:46:31 2012	(r301390)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Mon Jul 23 12:52:24 2012	(r301391)
@@ -696,6 +696,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-gdbm
     SUBDIR += py-hiredis
     SUBDIR += py-htsql
+    SUBDIR += py-htsql-mysql
     SUBDIR += py-htsql-pgsql
     SUBDIR += py-kyotocabinet
     SUBDIR += py-leveldb

Added: head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/Makefile	Mon Jul 23 12:52:24 2012	(r301391)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	py-htsql-mysql
+# Date created:		2012-06-16
+# Whom:			koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	htsql-mysql
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.1
+CATEGORIES=	databases python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME:U}-${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	MySQL backend for HTSQL
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}htsql>2.3:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-htsql \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}MySQLdb>0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-MySQLdb
+
+USE_PYTHON=	2.6-2.7
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	${PORTNAME:U}
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/distinfo	Mon Jul 23 12:52:24 2012	(r301391)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (HTSQL-MYSQL-2.3.1.tar.gz) = 9c4b4b9e97a79842ec129263d9ef524d4709c99d5a6fbc132e6a9489b0fe346b
+SIZE (HTSQL-MYSQL-2.3.1.tar.gz) = 15161

Added: head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/py-htsql-mysql/pkg-descr	Mon Jul 23 12:52:24 2012	(r301391)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+HTSQL ("Hyper Text Structured Query Language") is a high-level query
+language for relational databases. The target audience for HTSQL is the
+accidental programmer -- one who is not a SQL expert, yet needs a usable,
+comprehensive query tool for data access and reporting.
+
+This port provides the MySQL backend to HTSQL
+
+WWW:	http://htsql.org/
